tool_args.label: Fare-Free Bus Pilot
tool_args.raw_text: The 2023 New York State budget mandated the MTA to select and operate one fare free bus route in each borough for 6-12 months. The pilot began September 24, 2023, and fare collection resumed on September 1, 2024.

payload.description: One-year fare-free bus pilot on five routes (one per borough) mandated by 2023 NY State budget, Sep 2023 - Aug 2024

tool_args.label: Fare-Free Operation
tool_args.raw_text: Fare collection resumed on September 1, 2024

payload.description: Zero-fare bus operation on selected routes

tool_args.label: Pilot Start
tool_args.raw_text: The pilot began September 24, 2023

payload.description: Fare-free bus pilot began operation

tool_args.label: Fare Collection Resumed
tool_args.raw_text: fare collection resumed on September 1, 2024

payload.description: Fare collection resumed on pilot routes

tool_args.label: Ridership Increased on All Routes
tool_args.raw_text: Ridership increased on all routes.

payload.description: Both school months and summer months showed ridership increases on all five fare-free routes

tool_args.label: Limited New Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Limited new ridership: existing riders used the fare-free routes more than new route riders.

payload.claim_text: Limited new ridership: existing riders used the fare-free routes more than new route riders
payload.description: 12% of riders were new to the route; existing riders used the route more frequently

tool_args.label: Mixed Service Performance
tool_args.raw_text: Service performance had mixed results.

payload.description: Bus speeds decreased, dwell times increased, customer journey time performance dipped

tool_args.label: Fare Evasion Consistent with Systemwide
tool_args.raw_text: Fare evasion on nearby routes was consistent with systemwide rates.

payload.claim_text: Fare evasion on nearby routes was consistent with systemwide rates
payload.description: The rate of fare evasion on nearby routes was consistent with systemwide growth

tool_args.label: Foregone Revenue and Costs > $16.5M
tool_args.raw_text: Foregone revenue and related costs amounted to more than $16.5M over the pilot period

payload.claim_text: Foregone revenue and related costs amounted to more than $16.5M over the pilot period
payload.description: Includes foregone fare revenue on pilot routes, additional lost revenue, and operational costs

tool_args.label: 12% New Riders
tool_args.raw_text: While 12% of riders were new to the route, existing riders used the route more frequently and drove ridership increases.

payload.claim_text: 12% of riders were new to the route
payload.description: Existing riders (69% frequency) drove most ridership increases

tool_args.label: New and Existing Riders Similar Income
tool_args.raw_text: New riders and existing riders had similar income profiles.

payload.claim_text: New riders and existing riders had similar income profiles
payload.description: 44% of new riders and 46% of existing riders had household income <$28k

tool_args.label: New Riders More Likely Errands/Leisure
tool_args.raw_text: New riders were more likely to travel for errands and leisure, than for school or work.

payload.claim_text: New riders were more likely to travel for errands and leisure than for school or work
payload.description: 44% leisure/errands vs 40% school/work for new riders; 30% vs 58% for existing riders

tool_args.label: Pre-Pilot 27% Used Other MTA
tool_args.raw_text: Pre-pilot, more than one-quarter of new riders used other paid MTA bus and subway service.

payload.claim_text: Pre-pilot, more than one-quarter of new riders used other paid MTA bus and subway service
payload.description: 27% of new riders previously used other MTA bus/subway

tool_args.label: Route Selection Criteria
tool_args.raw_text: MTA's route selections considered: Equity for low income and disadvantaged communities, access to employment and commercial area(s), Existing route capacity, limited crowding conditions, service adequacy, Minimal overlap with other MTA bus services, Fare evasion levels

payload.claim_text: MTA route selections considered equity, capacity, overlap, and fare evasion
payload.description: Selection criteria for fare-free pilot routes

tool_args.label: Evaluation Methodology
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA presented results from the first nine months to the MTA Board during the NYC Transit Committee in July 2024. The initial assessment examined September to May pre-pilot and during the pilot (school months). The MTA evaluated June through August (summer months) to complete the full evaluation.

payload.claim_text: Evaluation compared school months (Sep-May) and summer months (Jun-Aug) pre-pilot vs pilot periods
payload.description: Interim results presented to MTA Board July 2024; full evaluation completed through August 2024
